The '''Memory droid''' was created by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] as a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] library. It stood about 2 meters high, and was hexagonal. They contained computers detailed enough to store a multitude of information. They were used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to record information such as the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] blueprints.

{{Droid-stub}}

*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
